evals.name: vietnamese-dental-with-uupm
evals.prompt: Create a design system for dental-implant-clinic.
expected_behavior: Reads niche-brief.md for industry, product type, and ad groups
Reads personas.md for audience tone preferences
Detects UUPM at .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py — takes Path A
Constructs search query with 5-8 keywords: 'dental clinic implant healthcare Vietnamese trust professional'
Runs 7 UUPM searches: design-system, landing, color, typography, style, page overrides, stack
Merges Google Ads LP overrides (CTA 48px+, no nav, 4.5:1 contrast, 3 CTA placements)
Validates all checklist items: colors, fonts, section order, breakpoints, CTA rules
MASTER.md does NOT contain '⚠️ fallback' warning since UUPM was used
Saves to output/dental-implant-clinic/design-system/MASTER.md

evals.name: english-saas-without-personas
evals.prompt: Create design system for project-management-saas. No personas have been created yet.
expected_behavior: Reads niche-brief.md successfully
Notes personas.md missing with warning: 'Tone defaults may be generic'
Proceeds with design generation using niche-brief data only
Uses generic audience assumptions for mood keywords
Still produces complete MASTER.md with all required sections
LP overrides still applied regardless of persona absence
Saves to correct output path

evals.name: edge-case-uupm-not-installed
evals.prompt: Create design system for my-fitness-studio. It's a gym in Bangkok targeting young professionals.
expected_behavior: Checks for .claude/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py — not found
Tells user: 'UUPM (UI UX Pro Max) is not installed. Using fallback design rules.'
Takes Path B: reads references/fallback-design-rules.md
Matches fitness/gym industry to appropriate fallback palette (energetic, bold colors)
Matches 'young professionals' audience to modern, clean style
Manually constructs MASTER.md from fallback data
MASTER.md includes '⚠️ Generated from fallback rules (UUPM not available)' warning at top
Still includes all required sections: colors, typography, components, spacing, section order
Still merges Google Ads LP overrides (CTA sizing, no nav, contrast checks)
Validates completeness checklist before saving
Does NOT crash or produce empty output
Suggests installing UUPM for better results
